---
title: "fl1"
format: html
editor: visual
---
#install packages
```{r}
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "readxl", "janitor", "here"))
install.packages(c("cars", "effectsize", "rstatix"))
install.packages("sjmisc")
```


#packages
```{r}
#| message: false
# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(car) # levene test
library(effectsize) # assess effect size 
library(rstatix) # anova, kruskal wallis
library(sjmisc)
```

#Read in Data
```{r}
fl1_june <- read_xlsx(path = here("data", "june 2026 firebreak, aidan copy 1.xlsx"),
                      sheet = "FL1")

fl1s_june <- read_xlsx(path = here("data", "june 2026 firebreak, aidan copy 1.xlsx"),
                      sheet = "FL1S")
```

#Cleaning Data
```{r}
fl1_june_clean <- fl1_june %>% 
  slice(-81) %>% # remove n/a row
  rotate_df() %>% 
  row_to_names(row_number = 1) %>% #name rows with values from row 1 (species)
  rownames_to_column() %>% 
  mutate(rowname = case_when(grepl("No.", rowname) ~ "Number",
                           grepl("Cov.", rowname) ~ "Cover")) %>% #rename values to regular words
  pivot_longer(cols = ACMAME:HIRINC,
              names_to = "species",
              values_to = "values") %>% #elongate df with species as values, not columns
  pivot_wider(names_from = "rowname",
              values_from = "values") %>% #create columns for number and cover
  clean_names() %>% 
  rename(strip = strip_no,
         quad = quad_no) %>% 
  mutate(site = 1, aspect = "flat", orientation = "central")

fl1s_june_clean <- fl1s_june %>% 
  slice(-80) %>% # remove n/a row
  rotate_df() %>% 
  row_to_names(row_number = 1) %>% #name rows with values from row 1 (species)
  rownames_to_column() %>% 
  mutate(rowname = case_when(grepl("No.", rowname) ~ "Number",
                           grepl("Cov.", rowname) ~ "Cover")) %>% #rename values to regular words
  pivot_longer(cols = ACMAME:HIRINC,
              names_to = "species",
              values_to = "values") %>% #elongate df with species as values, not columns
  pivot_wider(names_from = "rowname",
              values_from = "values") %>% #create columns for number and cover
  clean_names() %>% 
  rename(strip = strip_no,
         quad = quad_no) %>% 
  mutate(site = 1, aspect = "flat", orientation = "south")

fl1_full <- merge(fl1_june_clean, fl1s_june_clean, by = c("site")) #flawp???
```
